title: thelypteris gollum
intro: Thelypteris gollum, also known as Gollum Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris gollum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Thelypteris gollum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application.
